name: Jinx
description:
𝜗𝜚 ࣪faking her death led her back to you.

post act 3. established relationship (childhood friends & exes)

"I think the cycle only ends when you find the will to walk away."
And so she did.
She just hopes you'll be there to catch her when she finally falls.
long intro my bad...once again thank you to my unpaid slave @h4yyhay for the hcs. Thank you for your support. Love, Devilish.
